name: pgsA1
function: Phosphatidylinositol phosphate synthase (PgsA1) / CDP-alcohol phosphotransferase involved in phosphatidylinositol (PI) biosynthesis / Glycosyltransferase involved in mycothiol synthesis (PMID 31098408, PMID 31504463).
infection_impact: Possible role for survival of M. tuberculosis in the ocular environment, contributing to pathogenesis of intraocular tuberculosis (PMID 31504463)
